applicability_notes: Composite unary op (approximation of log-gamma). Golden registered as torch.lgamma. PCC threshold 0.999 in unit tests over uniform(-5,5) inputs; expect reduced accuracy near poles (non-positive integers).

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(x_torch, dtype=ttnn_dtype, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default interleaved DRAM memory_config
